requests==2.32.3
playwright==1.45.0
tenacity==8.4.2
SQLAlchemy==2.0.49
# greenlet is a transitive dep of SQLAlchemy; pin >=3.0.3 so wheels are
# available on Python 3.12 (older 2.x has no 3.12 wheels → build fails).
greenlet>=3.0.3
